title: Add file upload feature

requirements.text: Create a backend method to accept file uploads, store file metadata (filename, size, upload timestamp, content type), and return a unique file identifier
acceptanceCriteria: Backend accepts file data as Blob type
Stores file metadata including filename, size, timestamp, and content type
Returns a unique identifier for each uploaded file
Implements stable storage to persist files across canister upgrades

requirements.text: Create a backend method to retrieve uploaded files by their unique identifier, returning both file data and metadata
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts file identifier as parameter
Returns file data as Blob
Returns associated metadata (filename, size, content type)
Handles non-existent file IDs gracefully with appropriate error response

requirements.text: Create a backend method to list all uploaded files with their metadata (filename, size, upload date, file ID)
acceptanceCriteria: Returns array of file metadata records
Includes file ID, filename, size, upload timestamp, and content type for each file
Orders files by upload date (most recent first)

requirements.text: Create a Files page accessible from the navigation menu with a file upload interface including drag-and-drop zone, file selection button, and upload progress indicator
acceptanceCriteria: Renders a drag-and-drop zone for file selection
Provides a button for traditional file selection dialog
Shows upload progress with percentage indicator during upload
Displays success message with file name after successful upload
Shows error message if upload fails
Accepts multiple file types (documents, images, videos, etc.)

requirements.text: Display a list of all uploaded files on the Files page showing filename, file size, upload date, and download button for each file
acceptanceCriteria: Fetches and displays list of uploaded files from backend
Shows filename, formatted file size, and upload timestamp for each file
Provides download button for each file that triggers file download
Updates list automatically after new file upload
Shows empty state message when no files have been uploaded
Formats file sizes appropriately (KB, MB, GB)
Formats upload dates in human-readable format

requirements.text: Add 'Files' navigation item to the Navigation component linking to the new Files page
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation menu includes 'Files' menu item
Files link appears in logical order within existing menu items
Active state highlighting works for Files page
Link navigates to /files route

requirements.text: Configure routing in App.tsx to include the Files page at /files route
acceptanceCriteria: Files page route is defined at /files path
Route uses same Layout wrapper as other pages
Navigation to /files renders the Files page component

constraints: Keep all backend logic in the single main actor file (backend/main.mo)

Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Use existing color scheme from frontend/src/index.css with warm earthy tones (60° hue) and teal/green accents (160-180° hue)
Follow existing layout patterns from other pages (Dashboard, NetworkStatus, Settings)
nonGoals: File deletion or management features beyond upload and download
Virus scanning or file validation beyond basic type checking
